summary: Protect a private workflow by exposing only the contract, not the hidden operator logic.
boundaries: Public consumers can inspect inputs, outputs, and validation checks.
Hidden prompts and fallback branches are never bundled into the public package.
Use signed execution results to prove origin instead of revealing internals.
extraction_cost_notes: Extraction is not impossible, but reconstructing hidden branches should cost more than calling the runtime.
Expose only the contract layer and verification layer.
operator_guidance: Prefer remote execution for high-value workflows.
Bundle enough metadata for trust, not enough for reconstruction.
